name: Melissa Manchester
abstract: Melissa Manchester (born February 15, 1951) is an American singer-songwriter and actress. During the 1970s and 1980s, her music found widespread success and popularity, particularly in the adult contemporary market.

concerts.label: The New York Pops 40th Birthday Gala
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

concerts.label: The New York Pops 41st Birthday Gala
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Steve Buckingham,
about_quotes.evidence: I’m flying you tonight to Los Angeles to meet with Melissa Manchester to do her next album... Our first album was successful, and her second album. And we did a Christmas album in the late 90s. I mean we’re still friends.
about_quotes.doc_title: Steve Buckingham, interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, February 25, 2019 [interview 1 of 2]
